title: Metric Merge Feature in Metrics Glossary
story: As a data analyst managing duplicate metrics in the Metrics Glossary, I want to merge two metrics by selecting a primary record and consolidating their relationships, so that I can eliminate duplicates while preserving all related dashboards, reports, and category data.
description:
Introduce a merge feature in the Metrics Glossary that allows users to combine two metrics. The user selects multiple rows, clicks a merge button, and a side panel appears showing the selected metrics.

The merge workflow:
1. User selects 2+ metrics from the glossary table
2. A 'Merge' button appears showing the selection count
3. Clicking Merge opens a right-side panel listing selected metrics
4. User designates one metric as the primary (master) record
5. Non-primary metrics show checkboxes for which relationships to merge (topics, reports, linked metrics)
6. By default all relationships are selected; user can deselect via 'Select All' toggle
7. On merge: primary record keeps its Information tab data, all selected relationships are combined without duplicates
8. Merged (non-primary) metrics are soft-deleted

Limited to 2 records at a time to keep it simple for the first release.
acceptance_criteria: User can select 2+ metrics and see a Merge button with selection count
Merge button opens a right-side panel with the selected metrics
User must designate a primary metric before merging
Alert is shown if user clicks Merge without selecting a primary
Relationship checkboxes (topics, reports, linked metrics) appear for non-primary metrics
Select All toggle controls all relationship checkboxes
Only checked relationships are merged into the primary
Merged metrics are soft-deleted (not permanently removed)
No duplicate relationships are created during merge
Primary metric's Information tab data takes priority
ux_changes: Added a merge button that appears on multi-select. Opens a right-side panel for primary selection and relationship merge configuration with Select All toggle.
middleware_changes: New merge logic that consolidates relationships (topics, reports, linked metrics) from selected metrics into the primary. Performs deduplication and soft-deletes non-primary metrics.
implementation_notes: Merged metrics are soft-deleted, not permanently removed from the database. The merge only consolidates relationship records (topics, reports, dashboards). The primary metric's core information fields are preserved. At the time of implementation, dashboard and report relationships were not yet being auto-linked from the Analyst (that came later with MBT-504).
comment_summary: Developer requested elaboration, then scheduled a discussion call. Implemented the full merge flow with primary selection, relationship checkboxes, Select All toggle, deduplication, and soft-delete. Ryan praised the implementation.
